note_data.title: Science and Technology
keyPoints: Science is systematic and organized knowledge obtained through observation and experimentation about the natural world
Technology is the practical application of scientific knowledge for the benefit of mankind
Pure science is the study of science for the sake of knowledge without considering its practical applications
Applied science is the application of scientific knowledge to solve practical problems of human life
Engineering is the practical application of science and mathematics to design and build structures, machines, and systems
Biotechnology is the use of living organisms or their products to make useful substances or processes
Information Technology (IT) is the use of computers and telecommunications to store, retrieve, transmit and manipulate data
Pakistan's major technological achievements include nuclear technology, Tarbela Dam, and agricultural developments
Science and technology have revolutionized communication, transportation, medicine, and agriculture in Pakistan

definitions.definition: Science is systematic and organized knowledge obtained through observation and experimentation about the natural world.
Technology is the practical application of scientific knowledge for the benefit of mankind.
Pure science is the study of science for the sake of knowledge without considering its practical applications.
Applied science is the application of scientific knowledge to solve practical problems of human life.
Biotechnology is the use of living organisms or their products to make useful substances or processes.

importantQuestions.question: Differentiate between pure science and applied science.
importantQuestions.answer: Pure science is the study of science for knowledge sake without practical applications, while applied science is the application of scientific knowledge to solve practical problems of human life.

importantQuestions.question: Write a note on the role of science and technology in the development of Pakistan.
importantQuestions.answer: Science and technology have played vital roles in Pakistan's development: (1) Nuclear technology for energy and defense (2) Tarbela and Mangla dams for hydroelectric power (3) Green Revolution improving agricultural productivity (4) Medical technology improving healthcare (5) Information technology advancing communication (6) Industrial development through engineering applications (7) Space technology with satellite launches (8) Educational advancement through modern teaching methods.

mcqs.question: Which of the following is an example of applied science?
Tarbela Dam is an example of:
The use of bacteria to produce insulin is an example of:

commonMistakes: Students confuse pure science with applied science - remember pure is for knowledge, applied is for practical use
Writing incomplete definitions - always write the complete textbook definition word by word
Forgetting to mention Pakistani examples like Tarbela Dam, nuclear technology in long answers
Mixing up biotechnology with information technology definitions
Not explaining the benefits of science and technology in Pakistani context
examTips: This chapter usually has 1-2 MCQs and 1 short question in every BSEK paper
Definition questions are very common - memorize exact textbook definitions
Long questions often ask about Pakistan's technological achievements
Always give Pakistani examples when discussing applications of science and technology
note_data.keyDiagram: Flow chart showing relationship between Science → Technology → Engineering → Applications, with examples of each branch including Pakistani achievements like nuclear technology, dams, and agricultural developments
